creator: joneum@FreeBSD.org
text:
is there a chance, to switch the rubygem-unicorn>=4:www/rubygem-unicorn DEPENS to rubygem-unicorn51>=4:www/rubygem-unicorn51?

There is a PR 225978, and a Update for gitlab 10.4 needs rubygem-unicorn51>=4:www/rubygem-unicorn51. 

when not, i will greate a new Port with rubygem-unicorn51>=4:www/rubygem-unicorn51 as DEPENDS

joneum
